findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: For Hire Blanket CRFL tables: 8 separate year-specific tables (2007–2014) in the PDF are merged into a single HTML table. Year labels and column headers (e.g., 'For Hire Blanket Type', '0 to 18 Feet', etc.) are inserted as plain data rows in the <tbody>, losing their semantic meaning as headers and year-section dividers.
findings.evidence:
PDF pages 16-17 present each year as a distinct table with its own header row. HTML combines all into one where, e.g., '...' and '...' appear as regular data rows within .
